instruction: Explain the impact using correct acronyms where applicable.
input: A vulnerability was found in gmail-servlet and classified as critical. This issue affects the function search of the file src/Model.java. The manipulation leads to sql injection. The identifier of the patch is 5d72753c2e95bb373aa86824939397dc25f679ea. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue. The identifier VDB-218021 was assigned to this vulnerability.
output: SQL Injection (SQLi) vulnerabilities can lead to unauthorized access to the database, allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary SQL code. This may result in data breaches, data modification, or complete database compromise, posing a critical risk to Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability (CIA).
